title: Making mouse transcriptomics deconvolution accessible with immunedeconv.
author: Merotto L Sturm G Dietrich A List M Finotello F
content:
S-EPMC10924280 PMC10924280 Making mouse transcriptomics deconvolution accessible with immunedeconv.

Summary

Transcriptome deconvolution has emerged as a reliable technique to estimate cell-type abundances from bulk RNA sequencing data. Unlike their human equivalents, methods to quantify
